description: Upper Mesh upper with synthetic overlays for durability and style Synthetic overlays for reinforcement and added style Lace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized fit Sofly padded tongue and well-cushioned collar for in-step comfort and a secure fit Mesh tongue for improved ventilation Brand tab on tongue and brand logo embedded on the side Midsole Antibacterial treatment sockliner helps prevent odors, wicks away moisture and increases breathability Two-part, firm and soft density midsole delivers a rocking effect from heel to toes therby activating muscles Ultra-soft Resamax kinetic wedge extending from heel to toe gives each stride a gradual transition Outsole Specially dedigned durable high-abrasion rubber outsole with rubber treads maximise traction while enhancing cushioning Lugs on the outsole and terraced ridges on the periphery of the shoe gives extra traction
